parameters.responseBody:
✅ Pricing Approved

The pricing has been approved. SOW generation is underway.

You will receive a SOW review email shortly.

parameters.subject: =[AIIR] SOW Review Required — {{ $('Store New Doc ID').first().json.client_company || 'Unknown' }} / {{ $('Store New Doc ID').first().json.coachee_name || 'Unknown' }}
parameters.message:
=

AIIR SOW System — SOW Review Required

Engagement ID: {{ $('Store New Doc ID').first().json.engagement_id }}

The pricing has been approved. Please review the generated SOW document before it is sent to the client.

Engagement Summary

Client Company{{ $('Store New Doc ID').first().json.client_company }}
Coachee{{ $('Store New Doc ID').first().json.coachee_name }}
Tier{{ $('Store New Doc ID').first().json.tier }}
Total Price${{ $('Store New Doc ID').first().json.totalEngagementPrice?.toLocaleString() }}
Coach{{ $('Store New Doc ID').first().json.coachName }}
Payment{{ $('Store New Doc ID').first().json.paymentStructure }}

Actions

📄 Review SOW Google Doc

✅ APPROVE SOW & SEND TO CLIENT

To make changes: edit the Google Doc directly first, then click APPROVE. The system will send the current version of the doc.

AIIR SOW Automation System | Engagement {{ $('Store New Doc ID').first().json.engagement_id }}

meta.notes: AIIR SOW Automation — Workflow 2: Pricing Approved → SOW Generation. Triggered by clicking the approve link in the pricing review email. Before activating: (1) Set AIIR_PRICING_SHEET_ID, AIIR_SOW_TEMPLATE_DOC_ID as workflow variables. (2) Update AIIR_RATIONALE_DOCS_FOLDER_ID in Copy SOW Template node. (3) Replace credential IDs.
